body_excerpt: In sms_SetTpUdIe() of sms_PduCodec.cc, there is a possible out of bounds write due to a heap buffer overflow. This could lead to remote escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: In sms_SetTpUdIe() of sms_PduCodec.cc, there is a possible out of bounds write due to a heap buffer overflow. This could lead to remote escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges
